title: rubus odontophyllus
intro: Rubus odontophyllus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus odontophyllus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Rubus odontophyllus is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be consumed fresh or dried to reap its medicinal benefits.
